name: autodesk-fusion
description: Source-linked Codex plugin for Autodesk Fusion API development, Fusion Desktop MCP, Product Help MCP, Fusion Data MCP, APS Automation, Insider compatibility, Electronics read-only analysis, and safe CAD automation workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Build, inspect, automate, and verify Autodesk Fusion integrations.
interface.longDescription: Use Codex as a disciplined Autodesk Fusion developer for Python add-ins, Fusion API research, live Desktop MCP inspection, safe model mutation plans, APS/MFGDM cloud workflows, Automation API jobs, Fusion Insider compatibility, read-only Electronics analysis, and verification-first CAD automation.
defaultPrompt: Use Autodesk Fusion Developer to research the current official Fusion API, cite exact sources, and scaffold a safe Python add-in.
Use Autodesk Fusion Developer to inspect the active Fusion design through MCP, create a mutation plan, ask for approval, then verify the result.
Use Autodesk Fusion Developer to review this Fusion integration for Zero Doc handling, units, event lifecycle, assembly context, preview APIs, and destructive side effects.
Use Autodesk Fusion Developer to compare public Fusion and Fusion Insider capability snapshots without exposing NDA material.
